name: EURØP
reason:
Why list EUROP?
EUROP is a fully reserved euro stablecoin issued by Schuman Financial ([schuman.io](schuman.io)), an EMI regulated by the French ACPR under MiCA. Euro stablecoin pairs are underserved on decentralized venues. Listing EUROP positions CoW Swap early as MiCA drives euro on-chain volume.
Not a scam

Regulated by the ACPR (Banque de France). Full EMI license, not grandfathered.
Reserves at Société Générale, 2% buffer above 1:1 backing.
Audited quarterly by KPMG.
Live on Ethereum, Avalanche, Polygon, Plasma, XRP Ledger.

Liquidity (Ethereum Mainnet)
~€250K on-chain today. Actively ramping: Curve pools launching with multi-million EUR seed capital (EUROP/EURC, EUROP/USDC), Morpho lending markets and sEUROP (ERC-4626 yield wrapper) in pipeline, institutional LP commitments targeting eight-figure TVL. 

Tested on CoW Swap?
Yes. Swaps tested on mainnet, no issues with compatibility, approvals, or settlement.

More liquidity coming soon.
